name: Ioneer Ltd
analysis: INR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 47% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.1500, stop A$0.1188, target A$0.1700 (0.64:1) — then trail it.
